boundary: This runner executes the manifest contract. It does not authorize RTX speedup claims; claims require review of generated JSON, phase separation, and hardware metadata.
git_head:
fatal: not a git repository (or any parent up to mount point /)
Stopping at filesystem boundary (GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM not set).
git_status_short:
fatal: not a git repository (or any parent up to mount point /)
Stopping at filesystem boundary (GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM not set).
global_preconditions: Run on RTX-class NVIDIA hardware with RT cores, not GTX 1070.
Build the OptiX backend from the checked-out commit before timing.
Record GPU model, driver, CUDA, OptiX SDK, commit hash, and command output.
Keep validation/postprocess timing separate from native traversal where the profiler exposes it.
manifest_boundary: The manifest is a benchmark contract only. It does not authorize RTX speedup claims; claims require successful cloud runs, phase-clean evidence, and independent review.

baseline_review_contract.claim_limit: experimental native road-hazard summary gate only; not default public app behavior or full GIS/routing speedup
baseline_review_contract.comparable_metric_scope: strict road-hazard native OptiX summary result on the same copies/output-mode semantics
baseline_review_contract.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.

results.claim_scope: native OptiX segment/polygon traversal for compact road-hazard summaries
results.non_claim: not default public road-hazard behavior and not a full GIS/routing speedup claim

baseline_review_contract.claim_limit: experimental native hit-count gate only; not pair-row any-hit or road-hazard whole-app speedup
baseline_review_contract.comparable_metric_scope: strict segment/polygon hit-count result on the same dataset and output count semantics
baseline_review_contract.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.

results.claim_scope: experimental native custom-AABB segment/polygon hit-count traversal
results.non_claim: not default public app behavior and not a row-returning any-hit claim

baseline_review_contract.claim_limit: experimental native bounded pair-row gate only; not default public app behavior and not unbounded row-volume performance
baseline_review_contract.comparable_metric_scope: strict bounded segment/polygon pair-row result on the same dataset and output capacity
baseline_review_contract.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.

results.claim_scope: experimental native bounded custom-AABB segment/polygon pair-row traversal
results.non_claim: not default public app behavior and not an unbounded pair-row performance claim
